Detailed county Point-in-Time estimates by shelter type and subpopulation

Source: R/county_pit_detail.R
county_pit_detail.Rd

The shelter-type and subpopulation breakdowns of pit_coc_detail apportioned to counties through the Census-to-CoC crosswalk. A county's value for each (shelter, subpopulation) is its disaggregated total (from homeless) scaled by its dominant CoC's share of that category. Long format; join to county geography by fips (e.g. counties). As in pit_coc_detail, gender is available 2013–2024 only (NA from 2025 onward, dropped by HUD).

Usage

county_pit_detail

Format

A data frame with one row per county-year-shelter-subpopulation and 5 variables:

fips

5-digit county FIPS code.

year

Year.

shelter

Shelter type (see pit_coc_detail).

subpopulation

Subpopulation / demographic category.

count

Estimated number of people.

Source

HUD PIT subpopulation counts (pit_coc_detail) apportioned to counties; see homeless.

On this page
